The motion is granted as to Nos. 2-35, 36, 37-46, 48-76, 78-85, 87-90, 92-98, 100, 102, 104, 106-110, and 112-115. The objections based upon overbreadth, burdensome, and vagueness are overruled. The motion is granted as to Nos. 77 and 86 as Plaintiff is ordered to affirm that it has made a diligent search and reasonable inquiry.
The motion is granted as to No. 91. As to any documents withheld pursuant to a claim of privilege, they must be identified with particularity in a privilege log.
The motion is granted as to Nos. 99, 101, 102, and 103, limited to documents relied upon in support of the declaration and claims analysis.
Further responses and production shall be made within 20 days of notice of this order.
The matter of sanctions taken under submission. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT
